title: Live results: Allred seeks to oust Johnson in Texas House primary
author: The Hill Staff
fullText: Former Democratic Rep. Colin Allred, who ran for U.S. Senate last cycle, is seeking to upset Rep. Julie Johnson (D), who currently represents the 32nd Congressional District, in the redrawn 33rd Congressional District. The redrawn 32nd District, now expected to vote solidly Republican, has eight candidates vying for the GOP primary nod. Two Democrats are…
